testcase.name: Admin Panel DOM Structure › admin screen element exists in the DOM
Admin Panel DOM Structure › admin screen content area exists
Admin Panel DOM Structure › admin screen save button exists
Admin Panel DOM Structure › admin screen cancel button exists
Admin Panel DOM Structure › admin screen import button exists
Admin Panel DOM Structure › admin screen export button exists
Admin Button Visibility › admin button exists for admin users on desktop
Admin Button Visibility › admin button has tune icon
Admin Button Visibility › mobile admin button exists in the DOM
Admin Button Visibility › admin screen starts hidden
Authentication › should show login panel when not authenticated
Authentication › should have login form elements
Authentication › should show app title correctly
Authentication › should display brand logo
Navigation › should have main navigation elements
Navigation › should have mobile menu button
Navigation › should toggle mobile menu on click
Accessibility › should have proper ARIA labels
Accessibility › should have proper document structure
Accessibility › should have proper form labels
Canvas Drawing Flow › canvas element is visible
Canvas Drawing Flow › canvas container fills the viewport
Canvas Drawing Flow › toolbar is visible with mode group
Canvas Drawing Flow › node mode button is present in the toolbar
Canvas Drawing Flow › edge mode button is present in the toolbar
Canvas Drawing Flow › clicking node mode button dispatches click event
Canvas Drawing Flow › clicking edge mode button dispatches click event
Canvas Drawing Flow › mode buttons are inside the mode group
Canvas Drawing Flow › recenter button exists in the FAB toolbar
Canvas Drawing Flow › canvas zoom buttons exist in the toolbar
Canvas Drawing Flow › zoom in button has add icon
Canvas Drawing Flow › zoom out button has remove icon
Node Creation › canvas container is clickable (no crash on click)
Node Creation › sidebar element exists in the DOM
Node Creation › details container exists in the DOM
Cockpit — Landscape Layout › cockpit-mode class is added to body in landscape
Cockpit — Landscape Layout › cockpit container is visible in landscape
Cockpit — Landscape Layout › cockpit uses grid layout with two columns
Cockpit — Landscape Layout › intel strip (Zone A) is present
Cockpit — Landscape Layout › action rail (Zone C) is present in DOM
Cockpit — Landscape Layout › canvas container remains visible in cockpit mode
Cockpit — Landscape Layout › header stays visible in cockpit mode
Cockpit — Landscape Layout › cockpit deactivates when switching to portrait
Cockpit — Intel Strip › GPS card is present with satellite icon
Cockpit — Intel Strip › GPS dot element exists for status indication
Cockpit — Intel Strip › GPS accuracy display exists
Cockpit — Intel Strip › GPS satellite count element exists
Cockpit — Intel Strip › health card is present with completion ring SVG
Cockpit — Intel Strip › completion ring text shows percentage or placeholder
Cockpit — Intel Strip › sync status card is present
Cockpit — Intel Strip › sync icon shows cloud_done by default
Cockpit — Intel Strip › session tracker card is present
Cockpit — Intel Strip › session duration starts at 0:00
Cockpit — Intel Strip › session node count element exists
Cockpit — Intel Strip › session edge count element exists
Cockpit — Intel Strip › health issues element exists (hidden when no issues)
Cockpit — Action Rail › action rail has mode buttons for node, edge, home, drainage
Cockpit — Action Rail › mode buttons have aria-pressed attribute
Cockpit — Action Rail › GPS capture button exists
Cockpit — Action Rail › TSC3 survey controller button exists
Cockpit — Action Rail › undo button exists and starts disabled
Cockpit — Action Rail › redo button exists and starts disabled
Cockpit — Action Rail › zoom in/out/fit buttons exist
Cockpit — Action Rail › 3D view button exists
Cockpit — Action Rail › heatmap toggle button exists
Cockpit — Action Rail › more menu button exists and starts collapsed
Cockpit — Action Rail › collapse Zone A button exists
Cockpit — Health Card & Issues › completion ring SVG has bg and fill circles
Cockpit — Health Card & Issues › completion fill has data-level attribute
Cockpit — Health Card & Issues › health stats element exists
Cockpit — Health Card & Issues › issue list is hidden by default
Cockpit — Health Card & Issues › clicking issue count toggles issue list visibility
Cockpit — More Menu › more menu container exists in DOM
Cockpit — More Menu › more menu has Save button
Cockpit — More Menu › more menu has My Sketches button
Cockpit — More Menu › more menu has collapsible groups
Cockpit — More Menu › collapsible groups start collapsed
Cockpit — More Menu › clicking group header toggles expansion
Cockpit — More Menu › search group has node search input
Cockpit — More Menu › view group has size controls and 3D view
Cockpit — More Menu › sketch & export group has export/import buttons
Cockpit — More Menu › location & map group has coordinate controls
Cockpit — More Menu › measurement group has survey and finish workday buttons
Cockpit — More Menu › settings group has autosave toggle and admin button
Cockpit — More Menu › language toggle button exists at bottom
Cockpit — Intel Strip Collapse › collapse button exists in intel strip
Cockpit — Intel Strip Collapse › expand handle exists for collapsed state
Cockpit — Intel Strip Collapse › clicking collapse button adds collapsed class
Cockpit — Intel Strip Collapse › clicking collapse button adds zone-a-collapsed to body
Cockpit — Intel Strip Collapse › collapsing changes grid columns to hide Zone A
Cockpit — Intel Strip Collapse › clicking expand handle restores Zone A
Cockpit — Intel Strip Collapse › collapse state persists in localStorage
Cockpit — Intel Strip Collapse › collapse state is restored on page reload
Cockpit — Micro-Cockpit (Portrait) › micro-cockpit strip is present in DOM
Cockpit — Micro-Cockpit (Portrait) › micro-cockpit has GPS dot

Cockpit — Micro-Cockpit (Portrait) › micro-cockpit has role=status for accessibility
Cockpit — Micro-Cockpit (Portrait) › cockpit-mode is NOT active in portrait
Cockpit — Progress Bar › progress bar container exists with ARIA attributes
Cockpit — Progress Bar › progress fill element exists with data-level
Cockpit — Progress Bar › progress fill starts at 0% width
Cockpit — Accessibility › intel strip has role=complementary
Cockpit — Accessibility › intel strip has aria-label for survey status
Cockpit — Accessibility › action rail has role=toolbar
Cockpit — Accessibility › action rail has aria-label
Cockpit — Accessibility › collapse buttons have aria-label
Cockpit — Accessibility › all mode buttons are keyboard-focusable
Cockpit — Accessibility › heatmap button has aria-pressed for toggle state
Cockpit — Accessibility › map type select has aria-label

Cockpit — Orientation Transitions › canvas remains interactive after orientation switches
Cockpit — Condensed Status › condensed status bar exists in action rail
Cockpit — Condensed Status › condensed status has GPS dot, sync icon, and health percentage

Dark Mode › header has dark background in dark mode
Dark Mode › toolbar has dark styling in dark mode
Dark Mode › canvas container has appropriate styling in dark mode
Dark Mode › CSS custom properties are set for dark mode
Dark Mode › light mode has lighter backgrounds than dark mode

Projects Homepage › should display home panel in projects mode on load
Projects Homepage › should show dashboard icon in projects mode
Projects Homepage › should NOT have subtitle element (removed in refactor)
Projects Homepage › should render project cards
Projects Homepage › should display project names in cards
Projects Homepage › should display project descriptions when present
Projects Homepage › should have folder icon on each project card
Projects Homepage › should have "Open Project" buttons
Projects Homepage › should show close button in projects mode
Projects Homepage › should hide footer in projects mode
Projects Homepage › should hide sketch tabs in projects mode

Project Click → Canvas Navigation › clicking a project triggers hideHome
Project Click → Canvas Navigation › clicking a project shows the sketch side panel
Project Click → Canvas Navigation › sketch side panel lists all project sketches
Project Click → Canvas Navigation › sketch side panel shows sketch names
Project Click → Canvas Navigation › first sketch is marked as active
Project Click → Canvas Navigation › side panel toggle button is visible
Project Click → Canvas Navigation › empty project redirects back to homepage
Sketch Side Panel Interactions › clicking a non-active sketch switches it to active
Sketch Side Panel Interactions › eye icon toggles sketch visibility
Sketch Side Panel Interactions › side panel shows node count badges
Sketch Side Panel Interactions › active sketch has edit icon
Sketch Side Panel Interactions › close button hides the side panel
Sketch Side Panel Interactions › toggle button re-opens the side panel
Back to Projects Navigation › back button exists in sketch side panel
Back to Projects Navigation › back button has arrow_back icon
Back to Projects Navigation › back button links to #/
Back to Projects Navigation › clicking back button returns to projects homepage
Back to Projects Navigation › back button hides sketch side panel
Back to Projects Navigation › full round-trip: homepage → project → back → homepage

Fallback: No Projects → Sketch List › shows folder_open icon in sketches mode
Fallback: No Projects → Sketch List › shows close button in sketches mode
Fallback: No Projects → Sketch List › shows footer in sketches mode

Offline Resilience › app loads and canvas works even when API calls fail after initial load
Offline Resilience › app does not crash when navigating while offline
Offline Resilience › toolbar remains visible when offline
Offline Resilience › sync indicator exists in the DOM
Offline Resilience › app survives going offline and back online
Offline Resilience › app does not crash when projects API returns 500
Offline Resilience › no unhandled page errors during offline operation (excluding known init errors)

Sketches Button i18n Fix › desktop sketches button shows "Sketches" text, not [object Object]
Sketches Button i18n Fix › mobile sketches button shows translated text, not [object Object]
Sketches Button i18n Fix › sketchesBtn i18n attribute references sketchesBtn, not sketches
Header Recall Handle Fix › recall handle does not block canvas clicks when header hidden
Sketches Button Navigation Fix › clicking sketches button on home route still shows sketches
Dropdown Clipping Fix (Landscape) › menu dropdown uses position:fixed and high z-index
Dropdown Clipping Fix (Landscape) › user menu dropdown uses position:fixed
Dropdown Clipping Fix (Landscape) › command menu opens without clipping in landscape
Tablet Width Controls Visibility › controls are visible at 768px width (tablet)
Tablet Width Controls Visibility › controls not clipped at 700px width
Tablet Width Controls Visibility › progressive disclosure works at 850px
Exit Confirm Modal Definition › back-button exit guard does not crash on popstate
Canvas Redraw on Header Changes › canvas maintains valid dimensions after header toggle
Default Horizontal Stretch › horizontal stretch defaults to 1.0, not 0.6
Schematic View Feature › schematic view toggle exists in toolbar/menu
Full User Flow Smoke Test › user can navigate through app without crashes
Coordinates Reference Layer › app loads without error when coordinate handlers are invoked

Sidebar › should have details container
Sidebar › should have sidebar close button
Dialogs and Modals › should have help modal (hidden by default)
Dialogs and Modals › should have admin modal (hidden by default)
Dialogs and Modals › should have start panel (attached to DOM)
Dialogs and Modals › should have home panel (hidden by default)
Toast Notifications › should have toast container
Responsive Design › should show mobile menu on small screens
Responsive Design › should show desktop controls on large screens
Language Selection › should have language selector in DOM
Language Selection › mobile language selector should exist
3D View Button › 3D view button exists in the DOM for admin users
3D View Button › 3D view button exists in the DOM for regular users
3D View Button › 3D view button starts hidden (display:none)
3D View Button › 3D view button has view_in_ar icon
3D View Button › 3D view button can be made visible via JS
3D View Button › 3D view button is inside the canvas toolbar
3D View Button › clicking force-shown 3D button does not crash
